transcript.content: Your ethical certification claims are impressive. Can you share audit details?
My BATNA is 4000 from conventional suppliers.
We have third-party audits annually. The latest report shows full compliance.
Annual audits are good. Can we see the most recent one before finalizing?
We prefer to share after contract signing as standard practice.
That is unusual. Most suppliers share pre-contract. Let me consult our compliance team.
